notifications.payment_due_desc: Notify when a rent or utility payment is upcoming.
notifications.payment_overdue_desc: Notify when a payment is past its due date.
notifications.lease_expiry_desc: Notify 30 days before a lease expires.
notifications.tenant_paired_desc: Notify when a tenant pairs to one of your contracts.
notifications.penalty_raised_desc: Notify when a new penalty is created.
notifications.penalty_appeal_desc: Notify when a tenant appeals a penalty.
notifications.maintenance_raised_desc: Notify when a tenant submits a maintenance request.
notifications.maintenance_updated_desc: Notify when a maintenance request status changes.
pairing.title: Pair Tenant
pairing.description: Generate a one-time QR code for your tenant to scan and link to this contract.
pairing.generate_prompt: Click below to generate a pairing code. It will expire in 30 minutes.
pairing.step_1: Share the QR code or 6-digit code with your tenant
pairing.step_2: Tenant scans the QR code or enters the code in their app
pairing.step_3: Tenant is automatically linked to this contract
pairing.tenant_description: Enter the 6-digit pairing code from your landlord to link to your rental contract.

create_contract.title: Create Contract
create_contract.description: Build a legally-sound Thai rental contract step by step.
create_contract.tenant_blank_note: Tenant name and ID will be left blank for paper fill-in after printing.
create_contract.tm30_description: Thai law requires landlords to file a TM.30 form with Immigration within 24 hours of a foreign tenant moving in. This must be re-filed each time the tenant re-enters Thailand. The contract will include this obligation.
tm30.title: TM.30 Form Generator
tm30.subtitle: Pre-fill and print a TM.30 form for Immigration filing.
tm30.info_description: Thai law requires property owners to notify Immigration within 24 hours when a foreign national moves in. You can file online or print this form and submit in person.
tm30.stay_date: Date of Stay at This Address
tm30.pdf_error: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
create_contract.pro_required_desc: Contract generation with AI requires a Pro plan. Upgrade to unlock this feature.
create_contract.generating_desc: Claude is drafting your contract based on Thai rental law. This may take a moment.
create_contract.edit_hint: You can edit the contract text below. Changes will be reflected in the downloaded PDF.
create_contract.pdf_error: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.
onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Manage your rental properties, contracts, and tenants in one place.
onboarding.welcome_feature_1: Upload and translate Thai rental contracts

upload.error_type: Unsupported file type. Please use JPEG, PNG, WebP or PDF.
upload.error_size: File too large. Maximum size is 20MB.
upload.time_estimate: Processing may take up to 10 minutes for longer contracts. You can navigate away — it will continue in the background.
upload.background_note: This may take up to 10 minutes. You can leave this page — processing will continue in the background.
bug_report.title: Report an Issue
bug_report.placeholder: What happened? What did you expect?
create_contract.condo_act_note: Condominium Act B.E. 2522 applies in addition to standard rental law.
create_contract.legal_rights_note: These rights are automatically included per OCPB 2025 regulations and cannot be removed.
create_contract.right_early_termination: Tenant may terminate with 30-day notice after occupying 50% of lease term
create_contract.right_utility_tariff: Utilities charged at government tariff rates only — no markup allowed
create_contract.right_deposit_return: Security deposit returned within 7 days (no damage) or 14 days (with itemized deductions)
create_contract.right_quiet_enjoyment: Landlord must give prior notice before entering the property
create_contract.right_no_lockout: Landlord cannot lock out tenant or seize property without court order
create_contract.ocpb_termination_note: Per OCPB 2025: Tenants have the legal right to terminate with 30-day written notice after completing 50% of the lease term. This clause is automatically included in all generated contracts.
create_contract.validation_deposit_cap: Total deposit cannot exceed 3 months' rent (OCPB 2025 regulation).

property.photos_delete_error: Failed to delete photo. Please try again.

notification_rules.title: Notification Rules
notification_rules.subtitle: Automate reminders with custom rules and escalation chains.
notification_rules.empty_state: No custom rules yet. Create rules to automate notifications.
notification_rules.field_template_placeh: Hi {tenant_name}, your payment of {amount} THB for {property_name} is due on {due_date}...
notification_rules.pro_feature_desc: Custom notification rules are available on the Pro plan. Upgrade to create automated reminder workflows.
notification_rules.presets_desc: Apply a standard 5-rule escalation chain: reminders at 7, 3, and 1 day before due, then follow-ups at 1 and 3 days overdue.
notification_rules.settings_link_desc: Create custom rules and multi-step reminder workflows.
notification_rules.error_save_failed: Failed to save rule. Please try again.
notification_rules.name: Rule Name
notification_rules.template_hint: Use variables to personalise the message
notification_rules.no_rules: No custom rules yet. Create a rule to start sending automated notifications.
notification_rules.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
penalty_rules.title: Penalty Rules
penalty_rules.no_rules: No penalty rules yet. Add a rule to automate penalty creation.
penalty_rules.description_placeholder: e.g. Late payment fee per contract clause
penalty_rules.auto_apply_note: This rule will automatically create penalties during the daily cron job.
penalty_rules.pro_required_desc: Penalty automation rules are a Pro feature. Upgrade to unlock automatic penalty creation.
penalty_rules.invalid_days: Trigger days must be at least 1.
penalty_rules.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this penalty rule?
